name: Acmos Inc.
summary: Acmos Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides information technology (IT) solutions and services in Japan. The company offers IT infrastructure/building, system integration, and software development services, as well as system development, operation, and maintenance services. It also provides construction and maintenance of server environments and networks, and security related diagnosis services; back up services; business systems for enterprises, IT solutions for local government, space related systems, and fire-fighting communication command systems; consulting, system construction, operation management, and other services; and map related information and systems. In addition, the company offers data utilization solutions, such as university classroom evaluation questionnaire and campaign secretariat, as well as outsource services. It provides its services to clients in local governments, space, automobile, security, and medical sectors. Acmos Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
